text: Developing a mobile app requires careful planning. First, you need to choose between native and cross-platform development. Native apps are built for a specific system, like iOS or Android, and offer the best performance. Cross-platform tools, such as React Native, let you write one codebase for both platforms, saving time. Next, responsive design is essential to ensure your app looks great on different screen sizes. After building and testing, you submit your app to app stores like Apple's App Store or Google Play for review. A smooth launch and good performance are key to user satisfaction.
